description_long: This object depicts a modern residential property with two distinct houses separated by a central driveway and a tall, narrow blue structure, possibly a decorative tower or water feature. Each house is surrounded by manicured lawns and enclosed by low fences, with one property featuring a backyard swimming pool and landscaped greenery. The houses have flat roofs, large windows, and clean, geometric lines typical of contemporary architecture. The front yards are open to the street, with driveways leading to garages or carports. The landscaping includes trees, shrubs, and paved walkways, contributing to a suburban neighborhood feel. The materials appear to be primarily concrete, glass, and metal, with some areas of grass and vegetation.
description: A pair of modern, flat-roofed houses with large windows, landscaped yards, and a central blue tower, set in a suburban neighborhood layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses, the central blue tower, driveways, and street-facing facades.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the backyard pool, garden, and the rear of the right-side house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyards, pool, and the full length of the blue tower between the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the left-side house, its fenced yard, and the street access.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryways with flat doors, no steps, and open driveways; no prominent porches or columns.
